name: Oven Eggplant- Vegetarian Cooking for Diabet
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook 1 medium eggplant in boiling water covered for 5 minutes.
2. Drain and cut into 2 lengthwise halves.
3. Scoop out the insides, leaving about half an inch of shell.
4. Mash the eggplant with cottage cheese, onion, bay leaf, basil, oregano, and tomato sauce.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F.
6. Stuff the eggplant halves into a casserole dish.
7. Bake covered for 15 minutes.
8. Add a little water to the bottom of the casserole to keep the eggplant moist.
9. Top with wheat germ and provolone cheese.
10. Bake uncovered for an additional 5 minutes.
